📑 Terms & Conditions

Please review and accept to continue

Protective Flooring — Client Portal Terms of Service

By accessing and using the Protective Flooring Client Portal, you agree to the following terms and conditions:

1. Portal Access. Access is provided exclusively to authorized representatives of properties under contract with Protective Flooring. Login credentials are confidential and shall not be shared with unauthorized parties.

2. Order Submissions. Orders placed through this portal constitute formal service requests. All orders are subject to scheduling availability and confirmation by our operations team. Standard lead times apply.

3. Pricing & Billing. Pricing displayed in the portal reflects current contracted rates for your property. Final invoicing may include adjustments for field conditions, material upgrades, or scope changes authorized on-site.

4. Cancellation Policy. Orders may be cancelled or rescheduled without penalty up to 48 hours before the scheduled installation date. Late cancellations may incur a service fee.

5. Warranty. All flooring installations carry Protective Flooring's standard workmanship warranty. Warranty details and coverage specifics are available in the Documents section of your portal.

6. Communication. By using this portal, you consent to receive service-related communications via email. Optional SMS notifications may be enabled in your account settings.

7. Privacy. Information submitted through this portal is used solely for service delivery and account management. We do not sell or share your data with third parties.

Last updated: March 2026

📱 Text Message Notifications

Stay updated on your orders

Would you like to receive text message notifications for your flooring orders? You'll get updates for:

  • Order confirmations
  • Scheduling updates & reminders
  • Installation completed alerts
  • Important service notices

Standard message & data rates may apply. You can opt out at any time in your account settings. Message frequency varies.

Pricing Menus

📦 Materials
🔧 Labor
Materials — Set standard material costs per location. Used for all new proposals unless a property has overrides.
Labor — Set standard labor rates per location and service type. Use Shared Items for items like shoe mold and cove base that apply across multiple services.

Occupied Unit — Additional Step Required

An Occupied Unit Authorization Form must be completed and returned to our office before an install date can be confirmed. Please print, sign, and return the form prior to scheduling.
